'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 15: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 950 crore India net
description: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has made box office history, officially crossing the massive Rs. 900 crore India net milestone in just 14 days. The Aditya Dhar directorial, starring Ranveer Singh as the lethal spy Hamza, has collected a staggering Rs 922.26 crore domestic net so far. Despite the ongoing IPL 2026 season, the film continues to draw huge crowds, even outperforming the lifetime collections of the first 'Dhurandhar' in just 11 days. With a global haul of Rs' 1,466 crore, this action epic featuring Sanjay Dutt and Arjun Rampal is now rapidly chasing the elite Rs' 1,000 crore India club.

AAP removes Raghav Chadha as party's deputy leader in Rajya Sabha
description: The Aam Aadmi Party has requested the Rajya Sabha Secretariat to remove Raghav Chadha as Deputy Leader of the party in the Upper House.  The party also wants him excluded from speaking time allocated to AAP, proposing Ashok Mittal for the Deputy Leader role. This move indicates a significant internal leadership adjustment in Parliament, though official reasons remain undisclosed.

description: Mohsin Khan, 27, whose career has been marred by injuries, made his return to competitive cricket after a gap of 455 days. description: India's chess contingent faced a disappointing Round 4 at the Candidates tournament, with R Praggnanandhaa and R Vaishali securing draws while Divya Deshmukh suffered a significant loss. Praggnanandhaa's game was described as uncharacteristically subdued, and Vaishali narrowly escaped a difficult position. Deshmukh's experimental play led to fundamental errors and a decisive defeat.

title: Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs linked in bold first-round draft shake-up
description: The Dallas Cowboys are considering a proposed draft trade with the Kansas City Chiefs that would move them from pick No. 20 to No. 29 while gaining extra mid-round selections. The idea boosts depth, especially on defense, but risks missing elite talent. Dallas must decide between immediate impact players or building roster depth.

title: Divya Dutta says Amitabh Bachchan felt she wasn’t nice to him on ‘Baghban’ set
description: For Divya Dutta, working with Amitabh Bachchan early in her career turned into a life lesson she hasn’t forgotten. Speaking about her experience on the sets of Baghban, the actor recalled how she struggled to separate her on-screen character from real life.

title: Celtics vs Heat injury update: Who's playing, injured, team stats, and more
description: The Boston Celtics, leading their division, play the Miami Heat at Kaseya Center. Miami needs this win to secure a play-in spot. Both teams have injury concerns. Boston has dominated the season series. The Celtics are favored to win, but Miami's home advantage and determination could make it a close contest.
